revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-6-095

The first mark (or buoy) seen by an observer approaching the land from the open sea.

It usually serves to indicate the seaward approach to a harbour, river or estuary.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig53.jpg|400px|border]]


Note: In the U.S.A. this is also sometimes called a Sea-Buoy.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Landfall Mark (or Buoy)}}
